question.en: What image formats can I upload?

answer.en: You can upload PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, and BMP images containing QR codes.

question.en: What types of QR codes can be read?

answer.en: The reader supports all standard QR code types including URL, text, email, phone, WiFi, vCard, and other encoded data.

question.en: Why might a QR code fail to read?

answer.en: The QR code may be too small in the image, the image may be blurry or low contrast, or the QR code may be damaged. Try a higher resolution image.

question.en: Is my image uploaded to a server?

answer.en: No. The image is processed entirely in your browser using JavaScript. Nothing is uploaded to any server.

description.en: All processing runs locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
Get results immediately — no waiting for server processing.
Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers with no installation required.
No subscription, no limits, no hidden costs. Free forever.
